human_review_reason: The record correctly identifies this as a non-archivable container page. No human judgment needed to reject a pure listing page with no substantive content.

corrected_fields.summary: This source is a navigation/listing page for the Federal Reserve Supervision and Regulation Report, providing links to archived reports and testimonies from 2018 through 2025. It does not contain substantive research content, market-moving data, or specific macro catalysts. The actual reports are available separately as HTML or PDF documents.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: Container/index pages provide no standalone research value and should not be archived. Actual banking supervision findings, supervisory activities, and macro-relevant content exist only in the individual report documents linked from this page.
corrected_fields.macro_context: While the Federal Reserve Supervision and Regulation Report covers banking conditions and supervisory activities relevant to macro analysis, this listing page itself contains none of that content. Individual reports (HTML/PDF) from this index must be accessed for substantive macro context.
corrected_fields.market_structure_context: This listing page has no market structure relevance. Banking supervision content that might inform market structure analysis exists in the separate linked documents, not on this index page.
